projects.name: purgeTSS
projects.description: PurgeTSS is a toolkit designed to make it easier for Titanium developers to create visually attractive mobile apps. It offers features like customizable utility classes, support for icon fonts, a basic animation module, a simple grid system, and a "shades" command for generating custom colors.
